1.0.2.en: Fixed: Device no longer shows as "Unavailable" during normal offline periods (night, cloudy startup)

1.0.3.en: Added: Device settings now show Wi-Fi Signal Strength, Wi-Fi SSID, DTU AP SSID, Firmware SW Version and HW Version — fetched automatically from the DTU at startup using the AppInfo (cmd 0x01) and GetConfig (cmd 0x09) protocol commands

1.0.5.en: Inproved App Store page description. Fixed: Device no longer incorrectly shows as Unavailable at night or during network outages. Added diagnostic info (Wi-Fi signal, SSID, firmware version) to device settings. Smart night mode now uses your Homey's location to calculate sunrise/sunset automatically.
